sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; export default function About() { return (

{'Hi, I\'m Alan! 👋'}

💻 Full Stack Software Engineer | Go + React

{/* */} {/* */} {/* */}

My passion lies in solving challenging problems, designing algorithms, and communicating complex ideas to non-technical stakeholders.

I always look to exceed expectations and am effective both working as an individual and as part of a team.

In my spare time, I like to exercise 🚴‍♂️, read books 📚, listen to music 🎧, and participate in family activities. 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

I enjoy learning new things and connecting with people across a range of industries. If you ever want to bounce ideas off of me, please feel free to reach out to my email or phone number. 😄

⚡ Technical Skills ⚡

{/* */} {/* */}
Area Proficiencies
FrontEnd Figma, React, React Native, Angular
BackEnd Postman, Go, Node.js, Swift
CI/CD GitHub Actions, Jenkins, AWS
DevOps Jira, Confluence, Docker, VirtualBox
Mobile React Native
UI Frameworks Material-UI, Bootstrap
Databases PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL
Languages Java, Python, C, C++, C#
Web technologies Material-UI, Javascript, HTML5, CSS3
Misc Visual Studio, GitHub, Excel, Simio, Tableau, Minitab
AWS Services Lambda, API Gateway, Cognito, Amplify, VPC, SAM, RDS, CDK, EC2, S3, SNS, IAM
); }
